rationale: verus det.rs exits 0 with 1 verified, 0 errors. Stub built around the determinism predicate: EpMap is an empty struct so both epmap==epmap conjuncts are trivially true; CSingleMessage variants Message{dst:EndPoint}/Ack are equal under the stubbed send_single_message spec, which only holds for sm is None (forcing both r1,r2 to None). Proof block uses two assert statements (no assume/admit/external_body). Caveat: the real CTombstoneTable.epmap/CSendState.epmap are HashMap<V> (external_body, uninterp view), so the concrete epmap==epmap equality cannot be derived from the view-level postcondition of send_single_cmessage in the real source; re-injection of this proof block into the real file is expected to fail at those assertions because Verus has no axiom linking view equality to struct-level HashMap equality.
